name: Popcorn Macaroons
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Popped and chopped Corn Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk the egg whites until frothy.
2. Add salt and baking powder to the egg whites. Beat until stiff peaks form.
3. Gently fold in the toasted nuts or coconut flakes, and the chopped popcorn.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto a greased cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes, or until lightly browned.
